speedMetrics.label: Median
speedMetrics.desc: Half of all CVEs are published within 31 days of discovery. This is the fastest half of the pipeline.

speedMetrics.label: Mean
speedMetrics.desc: The average publication point, skewed upward by outliers. Most CVEs in this range are still being processed.

speedMetrics.label: 90th percentile
speedMetrics.sublabel: 10% of CVEs still haven't been published by this point
speedMetrics.desc: These are the stragglers in the system.

speedMetrics.label: Long tail
speedMetrics.desc: Some CVEs take years to be officially published. The longest delays stretch to over 6,263 days.
